selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 狮子, 狮子(星)座, 国际狮子会会员
words.definition: n. large gregarious predatory feline of Africa and India having a tawny coat with a shaggy mane in the male

words.translation: n. 驴, 傻瓜, 笨蛋, 屁股
words.definition: n. a pompous fool

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: n. 蛇, 阴险的人；vi. 曲折行进
words.definition: n. limbless scaly elongate reptile; some are venomous

words.translation: n. 老鼠, 胆小羞怯的人, 鼠标；vi. 捕鼠, 窥探
words.definition: n. any of numerous small rodents typically resembling diminutive rats having pointed snouts and small ears on elongated bodies with slender usually hairless tai

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主
words.definition: n. a male sovereign; ruler of a kingdom

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 马, 骑兵, 脚架；vi. 骑马, 取笑
words.definition: n. solid-hoofed herbivorous quadruped domesticated since prehistoric times

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: adv. 请；vt. 使高兴, 合...的心意, 取悦
words.definition: r. used in polite request

words.translation: n. 恐怖, 害怕, 担心；v. 害怕, 恐惧, 为...担心, 敬畏
words.definition: n. an emotion experienced in anticipation of some specific pain or danger (usually accompanied by a desire to flee or fight)

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. the organized beliefs of a period or group or individual

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止
words.definition: n. unstratified soil deposited by a glacier; consists of sand and clay and gravel and boulders mixed together

words.translation: n. 风, 气息, 气味, 呼吸, 风声, 趋势, 空谈, 卷绕, 弯曲；vt. 使通风, 嗅出, 使喘气, 吹号角, 上发条, 缠绕, 包, 绞起, 吊起, 使弯曲, 使迂回
words.definition: n. air moving (sometimes with considerable force) from an area of high pressure to an area of low pressure

words.translation: n. 兄弟
words.definition: n. a male with the same parents as someone else

words.translation: n. 朋友, 支持者, 赞助者
words.definition: n. a person you know well and regard with affection and trust

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: n. 财富, 运气, 兴隆, 大量财产, 好运, 命运
words.definition: n. a large amount of wealth or prosperity

words.translation: n. 狼, 残忍贪婪之人, 极度穷困；vt. 狼吞虎咽, 大吃
words.definition: n. any of various predatory carnivorous canine mammals of North America and Eurasia that usually hunt in packs

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
n. 小羊, 羔羊；v. 产羊羔
words.definition: n. young sheep

words.translation: n. 力量, 实力, 强度, 浓度, 人数, 抵抗力
words.definition: n. the property of being physically or mentally strong

words.translation: n. 感冒, 寒冷；a. 寒冷的, 冷淡的, 冷静的
words.definition: n. a mild viral infection involving the nose and respiratory passages (but not the lungs)

words.translation: n. 晚餐, 正餐, 宴会
words.definition: n. the main meal of the day served in the evening or at midday

words.translation: a. 热的, 热心的, 辣的, 热情的, 激动的, 猛烈的, 紧迫的；adv. 热, 紧迫地
words.definition: a. used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning

words.translation: adv. 一点也不, 毫不；pron. 没有人, 无一物, 并无一个
words.definition: r. not at all or in no way

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: n. 男孩
n. 休息, 中断, 破裂处, 绝交, 破晓, 突变；vt. 打破, 弄破, 弄坏, 破坏, 违反, 打断, 削弱, 放弃
words.definition: n. an unexpected piece of good luck

words.translation: n. 眼睛, 视力, 看；vt. 看, 注视
words.definition: n. the organ of sight

words.translation: n. 土地, 战场, 场地, 地面, 范围；a. 土地的, 地面上的
words.definition: n. a position to be won or defended in battle (or as if in battle)

words.translation: n. 爱, 恋爱, 爱情, 爱好, 性爱；vt. 爱, 爱好, 爱慕
words.definition: n. a strong positive emotion of regard and affection

words.translation: n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动
words.definition: n. a dramatic work intended for performance by actors on a stage

words.translation: adv. 宁可, 稍微, 相当
words.definition: r. on the contrary; rather (or instead), he wrote her a letter"

words.translation: n. 先生, 阁下
words.definition: n. term of address for a man

words.translation: n. 太阳, 日, 日光, 阳光；vt. 晒
words.definition: n. the star that is the source of light and heat for the planets in the solar system

words.translation: n. 敌人, 仇敌, 敌军；a. 敌人的
words.definition: n. an opposing military force

words.translation: n. 档案, 公文箱, 文件夹, 文件, 卷宗, 锉刀；vi. 列队行进, 用锉刀做
words.definition: n. a set of related records (either written or electronic) kept together

words.translation: n. 皮肤, 皮；vt. 剥皮, 在...植皮
words.definition: n. a natural protective body covering and site of the sense of touch

words.translation: n. 鸟, 羽毛球；vi. 打鸟
words.definition: n. warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrates characterized by feathers and forelimbs modified as wings

words.translation: n. 鱼, 鱼肉, 鱼类, 接合板；vt. 钓, 钓鱼, 查出, 用接合板连接
words.definition: n. any of various mostly cold-blooded aquatic vertebrates usually having scales and breathing through gills

words.translation: n. 黄金, 钱财, 金块, 金色, 宝贵；a. 金的, 似金的, 金色的, 金制的
words.definition: n. coins made of gold

words.translation: n. 主人, 硕士, 大师, 母机；a. 主人的, 主要的
words.definition: n. directs the work of others

words.translation: n. 囚犯, 犯人, 战俘
words.definition: n. a person who is confined; especially a prisoner of war

words.translation: a. 真实的, 正确的, 忠诚的, 可靠的, 纯粹的, 正式的；n. 真实, 准确
words.definition: a. consistent with fact or reality; not false

words.translation: n. 会议, 委员会
words.definition: n. a body serving in an administrative capacity

words.translation: n. 原因, 目标；vt. 引起, 使产生, 使遭受
words.definition: n. events that provide the generative force that is the origin of something

words.translation: n. 父亲, 祖先, 长辈, 神父, 创始者；vt. 当...的父亲, 保护, 创作, 发明, 培养
words.definition: n. a male parent (also used as a term of address to your father)

words.translation: n. 脚, 步调, 英尺, 底部, 末尾, 步兵；vt. 走在...上, 给...换底, 支付
words.definition: n. the part of the leg of a human being below the ankle joint

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的

words.translation: n. 会, 集会；a. 适宜的, 合适的

words.translation: n. 音乐, 乐曲

words.translation: adv. 也许, 大概
n. 理由, 原因, 理智, 道理, 前提, 理性；vt. 说服, 推论, 辩论
words.definition: n. a rational motive for a belief or action

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的
words.definition: n. a place within a region identified relative to a center or reference location

words.translation: n. 姐妹, 姐, 妹, 护士, 修女；vt. 姐妹般对待
words.definition: n. a female person who has the same parents as another person

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙
words.definition: n. a male human offspring

words.translation: n. 停留, 逗留, 制止, 延缓, 停止, 支柱, 支撑物, 支索；vt. 制止, 延缓, 坚持, 支持, 支撑, 用支索固定
words.definition: n. continuing or remaining in a place or state

words.translation: n. 安乐, 安逸, 悠闲；vt. 使安乐, 使安心, 减轻, 放松

words.translation: n. 蒙蔽物, 窗帘；a. 盲目的, 瞎的, 不加思考的

words.translation: a. 左边的, 左倾的, 左侧的, 左派的；adv. 在左面
a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 尾部, 后部, 辫子, 随员, 特务, 燕尾服, 踪迹, 限定继承(权)；a. 在后面的, 从后面而来的, 限定继承的, 尾部的, 后部的

words.translation: n. 宝物, 财富；vt. 珍爱, 重视, 秘藏
words.definition: n. accumulated wealth in the form of money or jewels etc.

words.translation: n. 两倍；a. 两倍的, 双重的

words.translation: n. 怀疑, 疑惑；v. 怀疑, 不信

words.translation: n. 举起, 帮助, 昂扬, 电梯；vt. 升高, 提高, 鼓舞, 清偿, 空运, 举起, 剽窃

words.translation: n. 错误, 误会；vi. 犯错, 误认

words.translation: n. 自然, 大自然, 本性, 性格, 性质

words.translation: vt. 可作...用, 服务, 经历, 招待, 供应, 送交, 对待；vi. 服务, 服役, 侍应, 适合, 有用, 开球

a. 能干的, 能够的

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏

words.translation: vi. 拉, 拖, 拔剑；vt. 拖拉, 挨近, 领取, 打成平局, 引导, 抽签决定, 画, 描写, 制订, 草拟, 吸引

words.translation: a. 坚硬的, 硬的, 难的, 艰苦的, 困难的, 坚固的, 猛烈的, 艰难的, 结实的, 确实的；adv. 坚硬地, 努力地, 辛苦地, 接近地, 猛烈地, 牢固地

words.translation: n. 生产品, 物产, 后代；vt. 产生, 生产, 提出, 出示

words.translation: n. 种族, 人种, 赛跑, 比赛, 急流, 人类, 同道, 姜根；vi. 赛跑, 竞赛, 疾走

words.translation: n. 上升, 高地, 增高；vt. 升起, 举起, 唤起, 提高, 使出现, 使复活, 提出, 筹集, 饲养
